heading: Transferred
label: 58a Transferred
notes: CodificationSection 58a was editorially reclassified as .section 6315 of this title

Prior ProvisionsA prior section 58a, , , , directed Sergeant at Arms and Doorkeeper of Senate to furnish not more than two WATS lines to any Senator requesting them, with the cost of such service to be paid out of contingent fund of Senate, prior to repeal by , effective first day of first calendar month which begins more than thirty days after .Pub.
